title: Zendesk Column search
excerpt:

posts.author: Kelly79 (Kelly )
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently there isn’t a function to search the Zendesk integration Ticket field. This is a problem if you have lots of tickets you have to track and search.

This seems a basic function and impacts workflows and ticket management.

Can this be looked into?
